# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function test: int (x: int)
  entry:
      LOAD t1, [x]
      t2 = ADD t1, 5
      STORE t2, [a]
      LOAD t3, [a]
      t4 = ADD t3, t3
      STORE t4, [b]
      LOAD t5, [x]
      t6 = SUB t5, 3
      STORE t6, [c]
      LOAD t7, [b]
      t8 = ADD t7, 1
      STORE t8, [d]
      LOAD t9, [d]
      RETURN t9

function main: int ()
  entry:
      t10 = CALL [test], 10
      RETURN t10
